# GitHub Official Integration Mastery

This mastery hub synchronizes the **250+ official GitHub agentic skills** currently active in the `.ai/skills` system. It ensures that all software engineering workflows follow the absolute standards defined by GitHub for AI-powered development.

## 🛠️ Synced System Capabilities
The following skills are linked directly to the executable `.ai/skills` directory:

### Core CLI & Copilot
- **cli-mastery**: Interactive training for GitHub Copilot CLI.
- **copilot-sdk**: Integration standards for the Copilot ecosystem.
- **github-copilot-starter**: Rapid onboarding for new agentic contexts.

### Architecture & Specs
- **architecture-blueprint-generator**: Automated generation of GH-standard blueprints.
- **implementation-plan-creator**: Standardized creation of implementation flows.
- **specification-writer**: Definition of technical requirements as executable specs.

### Workflow Automation (Actions & Issues)
- **github-actions-workflow-specification**: Declarative generation of CI/CD.
- **issue-feature-from-specification**: Automated issue creation from implementation plans.
- **project-workflow-analysis**: Evaluation of repo health and automation gaps.

### Migration & Quality
- **oracle-to-postgres-migration**: Specialized toolset for database modernization.
- **quality-playbook**: Enforcement of GitHub-grade coding standards.
- **threat-model-analyst**: Security-first architectural reviews.

## 📥 Execution Protocol
To invoke any of these synced skills within a project, use the corresponding slash command mapped in the system router.
